welcome.hi-IN: Namaste! BharatVani mein aapka swagat hai. Aap kya jaanna chahte hain?
welcome.en-IN: Namaste! Welcome to BharatVani. How can I help you today?

welcome_returning.hi-IN: Namaste! BharatVani mein phir se swagat hai. Aaj kya madad karoon?
welcome_returning.en-IN: Welcome back to BharatVani! How can I help you today?

nudge.hi-IN: Kya aap kuch poochna chahte hain? Main sun raha hoon.
nudge.en-IN: Would you like to ask something? I'm listening.

goodbye.hi-IN: Shukriya! BharatVani har samay aapki seva mein hai. Dobara call karein!
goodbye.en-IN: Thank you! BharatVani is always here to help. Call again anytime!
